prompt: フリーランスのポートフォリオサイトのトップページをHTMLで作って。モダンでミニマルな感じがいい。ヒーローセクション、実績セクション（カード3枚くらい）、お問い合わせフォームを入れてほしい。レスポンシブ対応で。

assertions.name: single-html-file
assertions.description: Output is a single HTML file with embedded CSS

assertions.name: has-hero-section
assertions.description: Contains a hero section with heading and CTA

assertions.name: has-contact-form
assertions.description: Contains a contact form with name, email, message fields

assertions.name: responsive-design
assertions.description: Has media queries or responsive CSS for mobile/tablet

assertions.name: uses-google-fonts
assertions.description: Imports and uses Google Fonts for typography

assertions.name: semantic-html
assertions.description: Uses semantic HTML elements (nav, main, section, footer)

assertions.name: no-emoji-icons
assertions.description: Does not use emoji characters as functional UI icons
